title: CNBC's UK Exchange newsletter: Horse racing in the spotlight — and under pressure
summary_full: This year's famous Cheltenham Festival comes at a time of crisis for British racing, which saw the head of the sport’s governing body quit amid acrimony.
summary_public: This year's famous Cheltenham Festival comes at a time of crisis for British racing, which saw the head of the sport’s governing body quit amid acrimony.
